subcodes.title: Words to Will and Wendell Dodge, spoken on 1901-12-01
subcodes.first_line: In this greatest period there are only two manifestations, the blessed Báb and the Manifestation of the Blessed Perfection.
subcodes.subjects: @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @contention and conflict, @twin Manifestations, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
